name: Cloudflare DNS
description: Cloudflare DNS provides authoritative DNS services with DDoS protection and global anycast. Use this API to manage DNS records, configure DNSSEC, and access DNS analytics for your zones.

capabilities.name: manage_dns_records
capabilities.description: Create, list, update, and delete DNS records (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, etc.) for a zone.

capabilities.name: get_dns_record
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific DNS record by its ID.

capabilities.name: create_dns_record
capabilities.description: Create a new DNS record in a zone.

capabilities.name: import_export_records
capabilities.description: Import or export DNS records in BIND zone file format.

capabilities.name: manage_dnssec
capabilities.description: Enable, disable, and configure DNSSEC for a zone.

capabilities.name: get_dns_analytics
capabilities.description: Retrieve DNS query analytics and metrics for a zone.
